ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each borough */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the zone belongs to */,
  "zone_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., airport, landmark) */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the location belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the ride occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location associated with the ride */,
  "payment_type" INTEGER /* Payment type used for the ride */,
  "ride_count" INTEGER /* Count of rides in the specified zone and location */,
  "ride_distance" REAL /* Distance of the ride in miles */,
  "ride_duration" REAL /* Duration of the ride in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ride was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ride was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_payment_type FOREIGN KEY ("payment_type") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each payment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle driven by the driver */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "payment_method" INTEGER /* Payment method preference of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who took the ride */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ride that was taken */,
  "ride_date" TEXT /* Date when the ride occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ride history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ride history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_histories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_histories_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone being analyzed */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides in the zone */,
  "total_payment_types" INTEGER /* Total unique payment types used in the zone */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated in the zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ride being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver rating */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the rating */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ride being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_ratings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_ratings_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who started the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
